salary_uk.source: Adzuna UK Job Market API, March 2026
salary_uk.validated_against: ONS ASHE (Annual Survey of Hours and Earnings)

salary_methodology: Salary ranges sourced from the Adzuna UK Job Market API using real-time advertised UK job postings. Data collected in March 2026 and cross-referenced against the ONS Annual Survey of Hours and Earnings (ASHE). Ranges represent advertised salary bands for UK-based roles and are scheduled for quarterly refresh.

data_sources.name: Adzuna UK Job Market API
data_sources.description: Real-time UK job postings and salary histogram data

data_sources.name: ONS Annual Survey of Hours and Earnings (ASHE)
data_sources.description: UK Government official earnings statistics by occupation

data_sources.name: ONS Standard Occupational Classification 2020 (SOC 2020)
data_sources.description: Official UK government occupational classification. All 300 roles mapped to 4-digit SOC 2020 unit group codes.

soc_methodology: UK Standard Occupational Classification (SOC 2020) codes assigned to each role using the ONS SOC 2020 Volume 2 coding index. SOC 2020 is the current official occupational classification system for the UK, published by the Office for National Statistics. Codes enable alignment with UK Skilled Worker visa eligibility, ONS ASHE earnings data, and UK Labour Force Survey statistics.
